resources.string: Already have an account? Sign in
Passkey sign-in isn\'t available right now.
No passkey on this device yet. Sign in another way, then add one from your profile.
We sent a 6-digit code to %1$s. It expires in 10 minutes.
Didn\'t get it? Send a new code
Verified! You earned %1$d Keys for joining via a referral. 🔑
Verified! %1$s’s invite just earned you %2$d Keys. 🔑
Someone you invited just verified — you earned %1$d Keys! 🔑
Small actions that top up your travel points. Do them once or come back for more.
Verify your identity to unlock this
A quick check unlocks every other way to earn.
Confirm you own a home you list.
Add photos and details so guests can picture the stay.
Tell the community how a stay went.
Share a home that gets booked
Share a listing and earn when it leads to a stay.
You both earn when they join and verify.
Take this action to earn travel points.
How are you hosting this home?
The whole home, while I\'m away
A room, or while I\'m here
I have the right to offer my whole home for a swap while I\'m away — and if I rent, my lease lets me host guests when I\'m not there.
I\'m responsible for following my lease, building rules, and local laws.
I have the right to host this swap.
I\'ll follow my building rules and local laws.
Please confirm the hosting acknowledgment before publishing.
Couldn\'t publish your listing. Try again.
A trust boost for guests. Never required to publish or swap.
Add a document that shows your right to this home — a deed or visura, or a lease in your name. An admin reviews it and, once approved, your listing shows a \"Verified owner\" badge.
A quick AI check reads the document first to confirm it matches this home. A person on our team always has the final say.
Renting is welcome. If you rent and your lease lets you host, you\'re fully eligible — you don\'t need to own the home.
Renting? You\'re welcome here too — upload your lease instead of a deed. You can host on Swapl as long as your rental contract lets you have guests.
We don\'t store your document after the check. Only the AI reads your personal details, and we keep just whether it shows a private home — never your ID, address, or the document itself.
Your document is read once to check the home is yours, then it isn\'t stored — we keep only the result (verified or not), never the document or its contents.
Swapl is a swap between private people, so company or commercial properties can\'t be listed here.

Your last submission is in review. A person on our team makes the final call — usually within 2 business days. If our automated check was unsure it can take a little longer, but you\'re not stuck: we always follow up.
Your last submission wasn\'t approved. Add a clearer document and resubmit.
Our check suggests this may be a commercial property — we may have it wrong

Our automated check read your document as a company or commercial property, and Swapl is a swap between private people. But automated checks aren\'t perfect, and a real person — never the AI — makes the final decision. If this is your own home, get in touch: a person on our team reviews these personally, usually within 2 business days, and a lease, deed, or tax record in your name is enough to set it straight.
How your nightly Keys are calculated
This is what a guest spends — and what you earn — for each night they stay. It\'s set fairly from your home\'s features, never by you or by us bidding it up.
Standard — your location isn\'t artificially boosted, but it\'s valued equally. Smaller towns and villages aren\'t penalised here.

Our AI reads only how your listing is presented — your photo coverage, how rich your amenities list is, and how detailed your description is. It doesn\'t judge your home harshly, and it never penalises small towns or villages — location is handled separately.
Bonus for home appeal: +%1$s (most homes score 0; capped at +%2$d).
Home appeal: 0 — completely normal, like most homes (bonus capped at +%1$d).
Home appeal: %1$s (most homes score 0 — add a few photos or detail to lift it).
Scored from your photos and amenities. A richer appeal read is added once our home-appeal model has looked at your listing.
Because you\'re offering a private room rather than the whole home, the nightly value reflects just that room — about %1$d%% of an entire-place rate.
Destination demand tier %1$d of 5 — how sought-after your area is for stays.
Your reviews (%1$.1f★ from %2$d) nudge the value up by %3$d%%.
Your reviews (%1$.1f★ from %2$d) ease the value down by %3$d%%.
Your reviews (%1$.1f★ from %2$d) keep the value right where it is.
Not yet applied — reviews start adjusting this value only after you\'ve received %1$d reviews. You have %2$d so far. Until then it stays at its feature-based level.
Now moving slowly toward your %1$.1f★ rating from %2$d reviews — a little at a time, never all at once.

This value moves at most %1$d%% per update cycle, and only once you have %2$d+ reviews. Even then, reaching the ±%3$d%% limit takes many cycles — a hard cap reviews can never push past — so a bad review week can\'t crash your earnings overnight.
Send your story anywhere — Messages, WhatsApp, email. It carries your invite link, so when a friend taps it and joins, you both earn travel points.
I\'ve swapped homes across %1$d cities on Swapl — travel on points, not cash. Join me with my link and we both score travel points when you verify: %2$s
Once you complete your first swap or Keys stay, your trips and the guests you welcome appear here as passport stamps — a postcard of everywhere Swapl takes you.
We couldn\'t load your story. Pull to refresh or retry.
A tamper-proof record that your cover is real — not crypto, no payment, nothing for you to do.

Add a partner or co-traveler to the conversation. They can chat with everyone here, but only the two swap partners can accept, counter, or cancel the swap — inviting someone never gives them any control over it.
How is Swapl working for you? Your rating helps us improve.
Tell us what\'s working — or what isn\'t (optional)
List your home to start swapping.
You\'ll need to sign in again to see your swaps.
Describe your dream trip — we\'ll compose a swap for you.
We couldn\'t reach Swapl. Check your connection and try again.
New homes appear here as members publish them.
This is a private room, so the nightly value reflects just the room — not the whole home.
Add your own listing before you can propose swaps.
Book one-way using the travel points you earned hosting — no swap back needed. Use this when a direct swap isn\'t a fit.
Your points are held until the host confirms. You\'ll find this stay under Trips.
Couldn\'t draft a message right now
Accepting locks in the dates and issues your travel insurance for the stay — both homes are then covered. You can still chat to coordinate the handover.
This turns down the proposal. You can\'t undo it, but you can always send a new one later.
This takes back your offer. You can send a new one later.
Swap accepted — your stay is insured.
How was the home, the neighbourhood, the handover?
Leave %1$s a review — it shows on their public profile.
We couldn\'t load your swaps. Pull to refresh or retry.
Propose a swap from any listing and it will show up here.
We couldn\'t load your trips. Pull to refresh or retry.
Accepted swaps become trips. Your upcoming stays will show up here.
Keys for keys — share this with your guest so they can get in.
Your host hasn\'t filled in their home guide yet.
The exact address in %1$s unlocks soon
The address and home guide unlock 48h before your stay.
Start the conversation — ask about dates, the neighbourhood, or anything you\'d like to know.
Only the two swap partners can invite people.
We couldn\'t find that person. Check the email or handle.
Couldn\'t send the invite. Try again.
Couldn\'t upload a photo. Check your connection and try again.
Couldn\'t determine your location — fill it in manually.
Add up to 10 photos of your home. We resize them before upload.
Confirmed — your stay is covered by a Swapl policy.
Book one-way with your points — no need to host them back. Good when your dates or home aren\'t a match for a direct swap.
Choose dates inside the home\'s availability (%1$s → %2$s). %3$d–%4$d nights. Booked dates are crossed out.

plurals.name: stay_keys_enough
plurals.item: You have %1$d points — enough for this stay (about %2$d night at this rate).
You have %1$d points — enough for this stay (about %2$d nights at this rate).

plurals.name: stay_keys_short
plurals.item: You\'re %1$d points short. Host about %2$d night at this rate to unlock this stay — or pick fewer nights. Points can\'t be bought.
You\'re %1$d points short. Host about %2$d nights at this rate to unlock this stay — or pick fewer nights. Points can\'t be bought.

resources.string: Your points are held until the host confirms. You\'ll find this stay under Trips.
You don\'t have enough points for these dates. Try fewer nights, or earn points by hosting. Points can\'t be bought.
Those dates aren\'t available. Pick dates inside the home\'s window.
Couldn\'t request this stay right now.
Saved searches are a Plus member feature.
In return you host in %1$s · %2$s for the same dates.
If anyone is unsafe or locked out, call %1$s.
If anyone is unsafe or locked out, our 24/7 line is here. Tap to reach support now.
Tell us what\'s going on with your swap. We\'ll loop in your swap partner and our support team.
Tell us what\'s going on with your swap with %1$s. We\'ll loop in your swap partner and our support team.
What happened, when, and what you need from us.
Your report hasn\'t been sent yet. If you leave now, what you\'ve written will be lost.
Couldn\'t upload a photo. Check your connection and try again.
Locked out, wrong code, keys missing
The home wasn\'t ready or clean
You feel unsafe or something\'s wrong
Your swap partner didn\'t follow through
Anything else you need help with
Fill the essentials so your guest can settle in without messaging you.
Snap a few baseline photos of the home as you arrive — it protects you both if anything\'s queried later.
Snap a few photos as you leave, so the state of the home is on record.
e.g. everything looks great, keys collected
We couldn\'t load the metrics. Pull to refresh or retry.
Booked dates from confirmed swaps and points stays are shown crossed out — guests can\'t pick them. Tap a start and end day to block dates for yourself (renovations, personal use).
Now tap the checkout day to finish blocking.
We couldn\'t reach Swapl. Check your connection and try again.
Tap the heart on any home to save it here.
Profile deleted. We\'ll only rebuild it if you ask.
Built only from what you do on Swapl. You can refresh or delete it anytime.
Built only from what you do on Swapl: %1$s. You can refresh or delete it anytime.
This erases the AI\'s summary of your tastes. It won\'t come back unless you rebuild it.
Profile refreshed too recently — try again in a bit.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
You\'ve reached your plan\'s travel-window limit
Tell us when you\'d like to travel — we\'ll bring you ready-made swaps for those dates.
When do you want to go?
Save the dates you\'re dreaming about. The assistant composes swaps from real homes that are free exactly then.
Your end date must be after the start date.
We\'ll widen the search around these days.
Comma-separated cities or countries — leave empty for anywhere.
Finding homes free for your dates…
Add an active listing first — a swap needs two homes.
Nothing free for these exact dates yet — we\'ll keep watching and email you when a match appears.
No completed swaps yet — passport stamps appear here after each stay.
No reviews yet — hosts review each other after a completed swap.
Tell hosts a little about yourself.
Saved. Your public profile is up to date.
Leave empty if you signed up with Google, Telegram or an email code.
At least 6 characters. Other devices get signed out.
Too many attempts — try again in an hour.
Couldn\'t change the password. Try again.
Allow your listing pages to appear in search engines like Google.
Display your home city and country on your public profile.
Proposals, confirmations and trip reminders by email.
Real-time alerts on this device when something needs you.
Points you earn by hosting. Spend them on a stay — never money, never bought or cashed out.
This is what you earn each night a guest stays — points you can then spend on a stay elsewhere.
No points activity yet. Earn points by hosting, or gift some to a friend.
Spend them on a stay without a simultaneous swap. Points are not money — you can\'t buy or cash them out.
Send points to a verified friend

plurals.name: keys_balance_covers
plurals.item: Your balance covers about %1$d night at this rate.
Your balance covers about %1$d nights at this rate.

resources.string: Spend those %1$d points on 2 nights somewhere else
That\'s the whole loop: host → earn points → travel → repeat. No money changes hands.
Get %1$d points the moment you\'re verified — instantly.
Earn points every night a guest stays with you.
A verified friend can send you points — share your member ID.
Ask your friend for their Swapl member ID. They must be a verified member.
Up to %1$d per gift, %2$d per day. Points are a gift — they can\'t be bought or cashed out.
Both you and your friend need to be verified members to gift points.
We couldn\'t find that member. Double-check the ID.
You don\'t have enough points for this gift.
Bring friends, earn travel points, climb the early-access line. Points are never money.
Join me on Swapl — swap homes and travel on points, not cash. Use my link and we both score %1$d travel points when you verify: %2$s
Every friend who joins and verifies earns you %1$d travel points — and bumps you up the early-access line. Points are never money.
Share this whole link — it\'s what counts. One tap sends it anywhere: Messages, WhatsApp, email. Your friend taps it, joins, and once they verify you both get points.
Send a personal invite tied to your home
Invite your first friend to unlock perks.
Top tier reached — you\'re a Swapl founder.
Points land only once a friend verifies their identity — that keeps the line fair for everyone. Points are travel credit, never cash.
Invite-to-stay links are tied to your own listing. Create a home in Account, then invite a friend to come stay.
Verify this listing before inviting guests to stay — otherwise your friend\'s reward can\'t be paid out. Verify it from Account → your listing.
Add an email to auto-match the invite when they sign up, or leave it blank for an open link anyone can use.
I\'d love to host you on Swapl — swap homes and travel on points, not cash. Here\'s your invite to stay at %1$s: %2$s
When they join and verify, you both earn %1$d travel points. Points are never money.
When they join and verify, you both earn travel points. Points are never money.
Verify this listing before inviting guests to stay — otherwise your friend\'s reward can\'t be paid out.
You can only invite guests to your own listing.
You\'ve sent a lot of invites in the last hour — try again in a bit. It\'s a quick cooldown, not a ban.
Couldn\'t create the invite right now.
Tell us the trip you\'re dreaming about — we\'ll compose a swap from real homes that match yours.
Somewhere warm with great food, walkable, good for working remotely…
Listening — speak freely, tap the mic again to stop.
Microphone access is turned off for Swapl — enable it in Settings to dictate your wish.
Otherwise we\'ll use your home\'s availability.
Checking who\'s free when you are…
Suggested from your home\'s availability — adjust freely.
Drafted by AI from your listing and theirs — make it yours.
Booked on our partners\' sites at their prices — swapl may earn a commission, never a markup.
Real catalogue prices. Untick anything you don\'t want — you\'ll only be charged if the host accepts your swap.
Nothing payable — confirming just sends the proposal.
You\'ll only be charged if the host accepts your swap.
Partner experiences and services are booked on the partners\' sites — never charged by swapl and not part of this total.
We need an active home of yours — and at least one compatible match — to compose a package.
You\'re dreaming fast! Give it a few minutes and try again.
You\'ve reached your plan\'s proposal limit. Upgrade to send more.
Your account can\'t send proposals right now.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
